text_or_summary: # Evidence Layer - Opening abstract states that implicit theories orient individuals toward goals and goals set up adaptive versus maladaptive patterns. Source pointer: `rawmarkdown_full/paper-dweck-and-leggett-1988-dweck-und-leggett-a-social-cognitive-approach-to-motivation-and-personality.md`. - Early sections contrast helpless and mastery-oriented patterns among children with equal ability confronting difficulty. Source pointer: `rawmarkdown_full/paper-dweck-and-leggett-1988-dweck-und-leggett-a-social-cognitive-approach-to-motivation-and-personality.md`. - Later sections state that entity theories are associated with performance goals and incremental theories with learning/development go…
